folio.label: 97r
folio.l: But eke beside , in many a Regiouö
If on seitú wel , a nother seitú the same
So spredetú , of hire heye bounte , the fame

note.notetxt: 418There is a change in the ink colour after the first three lines. From light brown to brown?.ODR

folio.l: That men & wommen , as wel ©onge as olde
Gon to Saluces , vp on hire to byholde
¢ Thus Walter lowely , nay but really
Wedded , witú fortunat honestete
In goddis pees , lyuetú ful esily
At hom , and grace I now , outward had he
And for he saw , that vnder lowe degree
Was often vertue hid , the peeple hi~ helde
A prudent man , and that is sen ful selde
¢ Nat oonly this Grisildis , thurgú hire wytte
Coude al the feet , of wyfly humblenesse
But eke whan that the caas , requered ytte
The comune ¸fyt , coude she redresse
There nas discord , rancour ne heuynesse
In al that lond , that she ne coude appese
And wysely brynge hem alle , in reste and ease
¢ Thougú that hire husbonde , absent were or noon
If gentil men , or othere of the contree
Weren wrothe , she wolde brynge hem at oon
So wyse , and ripe wordes , had she
And Iuggementz , of so grete equyte
That she from heuene , sent was , as men wende

note.notetxt: 440Something in the right margin has been rubbed off. Perhaps a cross; remainings of red ink. ODR

folio.l: Peeple to saue , and euäy wrongö to amende
¢ Nougút longe tyme after , that this Grisilde
Was wedded , she a dougúter hatú I bore
Al had hire leuere , han born~ a knaue childe
Glad was this Markys , and his folk therfore
For thougú a mayden child , come al byfore
She may vn to a knaue child , atteyne
Be lyklihede , syn she nys nat bareyne
¢ There fel , as it byfalletú tymes moo
Whan that this child , hatú souked but a throwe
This Markys in his hert , longetú so
To tempte his wyf , hire sadnesse for to knowe
That he ne mygút , out of his hert throwe
This mäueillous desir , his wyf to assaye
Nathelees god wot , he thougút hire for to affraye
¢ He had assayed hire , I now byfore
And fond hire euäe good , what nedetú it
Hire for to tempte , and alwey more and more
But as for me I seye , that euyl it sitte
